home.title: NeckChart – Fretboard Diagram, Scales & Online Guitar Tab Editor
home.subtitle: Build guitar tabs and visualize scales on guitar, bass, ukulele and any string instrument — free online tool
home.commonScalesSubtitle: Choose a scale to visualize it on the fretboard
home.instrumentsSubtitle: Choose an instrument and explore its scales on the fretboard

major.title: Major Scale
major.description: The most common scale in Western music. Foundation of classical, pop, rock and country. Visualize all major scale patterns and positions on guitar, bass, ukulele and more fretboards.

natural_minor.title: Natural Minor Scale
natural_minor.description: The most used minor scale in music. Essential for rock, metal, classical and folk. See every position of the natural minor scale on guitar, bass, violin and any string instrument fretboard.

blues.title: Blues Scale
blues.description: The signature scale of blues and rock guitar. Six notes with the flat fifth blue note. Visualize all positions on the fretboard and build guitar tabs with bends and slides.

major_pentatonic.title: Major Pentatonic Scale
major_pentatonic.description: Five-note scale widely used in country, pop and rock guitar solos. One of the most beginner-friendly scales. Explore all fretboard positions on guitar, bass and ukulele.

minor_pentatonic.title: Minor Pentatonic Scale
minor_pentatonic.description: The go-to scale for rock, blues and jazz guitar solos. Five notes that work over almost any chord progression. View the complete fretboard diagram and build tabs.

dorian.title: Dorian Mode
dorian.description: Minor modal scale with a raised sixth. Used in jazz, funk and modern rock. Visualize the Dorian mode on guitar and bass fretboard — all positions and patterns.

mixolydian.title: Mixolydian Mode
mixolydian.description: Major scale with a flat seventh. Widely used in blues, rock and Celtic music. Essential for dominant chord improvisation. See all Mixolydian patterns on the fretboard.

lydian.title: Lydian Mode
lydian.description: Major scale with an augmented fourth. Gives a dreamy, ethereal sound used in film scores and progressive rock. Explore all Lydian mode positions on the guitar fretboard.

phrygian.title: Phrygian Mode
phrygian.description: Minor scale with a flat second giving a Spanish or flamenco feel. Popular in metal, flamenco and Middle Eastern music. Visualize Phrygian mode on guitar and bass.

eolian.title: Aeolian Mode
eolian.description: The Aeolian mode is identical to the natural minor scale. Fundamental in rock, pop and classical music. See all positions of the Aeolian mode on any string instrument fretboard.

descriptions.electric-guitar: Visualize scales and build tabs for electric guitar and acoustic guitar
descriptions.bass: Explore scale patterns and fretboard diagrams for electric and acoustic bass
descriptions.violin: Fretboard diagram and scales for violin — beginner to advanced
descriptions.ukulele: Scale diagrams and fretboard charts for soprano, concert and tenor ukulele
descriptions.banjo: Explore scale positions and fretboard diagrams for 5-string banjo
descriptions.mandolin: Scale diagrams and fretboard charts for 8-string mandolin
descriptions.cavaquinho: Fretboard diagram and scales for Brazilian cavaquinho
